titleStmt.title: SII 38.179: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 179. (A.R. No. 179 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the nineteenth slab built into the floor of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that [Pū]laichchirāṇiyār, the mother of Vallavaraiyar Kannaradēva, donated 30 kaḻañju of gold tested by the touch stone of the ūr to burn a perpetual lamp to the deity, Mahādēva at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The sabhā of Kuṟaṭṭūr alias Parāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Ambattūr-ērikīḻ-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Puḻar-kōṭṭam received the gift. They agreed to remit 4(1/2) kaḻañju of gold annually i.e., 2(1/4) kaḻañju of gold every six months as interest at the rate of 3 mañjāḍi of gold per kaḻañju per annum to the temple towards the supply of oil to burn the perpetual lamp. This was to take effect from the month of Āḍi in the year quoted. It there was any default, the sabhā agreed to pay a fine of 8(1/2) kāṇam daily to the court of justice. They undertook to remit the interest even after paying the fine. The sabhā also agreed to provide two meals to the persons who came to collect the interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
kacciyuntañcaiyuṅkoṇṭa śrīkannaradevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattiraṇṭāvatu vallava
raiyar kannaratevar tāyār pūlaiccirāṇiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr (ma)mahādevaṟku Āndratāramum Oru
viḷakkerippataṟku vaitta poṉ Ūrkkaṟcemmai muppatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ muppatiṉ ka
m puḻaṟkoṭṭattu Ampattūr Erikiḻnāṭṭuk kuṟaṭṭurākiya śrīparāntakacatu
timaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ippoṉṉāl Ivvāṭṭai Ā(ṭ)ṭi mutal kaḻañciṉ vāy mu
ṟu mañcāṭippoṉ palicaiyāka Āṟāṟu tiṅkaḷ nāḷil Iru kaḻañce kāṟpoṉ
ṉāka Āṇṭuvarai nāṟkaḻañcarai poṉṉun tiruvoṟṟiyūrāṇikkiḻ Ācandratāramum nilaip po
li Ūṭṭāka tiruviḷa(k)keṇaikkuRead tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkukoṇṭu ceṉṟiṭuvomāṉom Itaṟṟiṟampilluṇṭi
kaiyum paṭṭikaiyum kāṭṭāte dharmmāsanattu nicatam Eṭṭarai kāṇan taṇṭappaṭuvo
m kuṭitiṟampil nicatam nāley kāl kāṇantaṇṭap paṭuvatākavum Iṭṭa kāṇam ce
ṉṟu niṉṟuppuḷḷi kuttuvikkap peṟātatākavum Oṭṭikkuṭuttom Ittaṇṭapaṭṭu
m Ippoliyūṭṭu vaḻuvāmai Iṭṭukkuṭuppomāṉom Ippoṉ ka
ṭaik kūṭṭavantārkku nicatam Iraṇṭucoṟu kuṭuppomāṉom muṟco
llappaṭṭa kuṟaṭṭur sabhaiyom §
Digital edition of SII 38.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
